hero.sub:
AI-curated medical literature briefings for busy clinicians.
Catch up on journal trends during your commute.
hero.note: No credit card required · Free usage every month

items.label: of clinicians read only the abstract
items.source: Baudoin et al., Ann Intern Med 1999

items.label: listen to medical audio during commute or exercise
items.source: Barton et al., Anat Sci Educ 2025

items.label: new papers added to PubMed every year

steps.title: Choose your specialty & journals
steps.desc: Select your specialty and get top journals recommended automatically. Search and add any journal by name.

steps.title: AI analyzes the trends
steps.desc: Open any issue and get an instant AI briefing — key themes, top papers, and what matters for your practice.

steps.title: Listen on your commute
steps.desc: Turn summaries into audio narration. Build a playlist and listen to multiple papers back-to-back on the go.

features.label: Features
features.title: A new way to stay current

items.title: Issue Explorer
items.desc: Select any journal issue to see AI-generated trend analysis, top 5 papers, and the complete paper list.

items.title: Trend Briefings
items.desc: Quarterly and annual trend analysis written like an editor's note. With an 8-minute audio briefing.

items.title: Topic Search
items.desc: Filter within a journal by topic — spasticity, gait, FIM, CIMT — to find relevant papers instantly.

items.title: Full-text OA Summaries
items.desc: For open-access papers, we fetch the full text via Unpaywall and PMC for deeper, more accurate summaries.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Try it first, pay when it clicks

plans.name: BYOK
items: Use your own Gemini / ElevenLabs API key
Typically a few cents/month in API costs

auth.syncHint: Your specialty and journal preferences sync across devices.

trend.title: 📈 This quarter's trends
trend.loadingHint: First analysis takes 5–10 seconds. Cached afterwards.

journals.emptyDesc: Pick a specialty and favorite (⭐) journals to see new issues at a glance.
journals.title: 📬 My journals
journals.newIssueTitle: Haven't viewed recently or first-time — a new issue may have been published

usage.exhausted: You've used up your free {label} quota this month.
usage.running: You're close to your free {label} quota this month.
usage.upgradeHint: Upgrade to BYOK ($19.99 lifetime) or Pro ($7.99/mo) to remove limits.
